then
  echo "arena argument should be 1, 2 or 3. Defaulting to 1."
  export ARENA_TYPE=1
fi;
if [ $ARENA_TYPE -eq 1 ]
then
  export TILE_X=12.5
  export TILE_Y=-3.0
  export TILE_Z=2.0
  export TILE_YAW=3.1415926
elif [ $ARENA_TYPE -eq 2 ]

  export TILE_X=9.0
  export TILE_Y=-7.5
  export TILE_Z=2.5
  export TILE_YAW=1.57079632679
elif [ $ARENA_TYPE -eq 3 ]
then
  export TILE_X=7.5
  export TILE_Y=7.5
  export TILE_Z=3.5
  export TILE_YAW=-1.57079632679
fi;
